steps.title: Compare the two sides
steps.content:
For any real value of $x$, a square cannot be negative:
$$
(x+64)^2\ge 0
$$
But the equation requires
$$
(x+64)^2=-144
$$

steps.title: Count real solutions
steps.content: No real value of $x$ can make a square equal a negative number, so the equation has zero distinct real solutions. The answer is D.
